reviews.review_title: fix your game Fix your game
reviews.review_description:
when I download this game, it seems normal, but the gate was shut. I cannot play or join any lobbies fix your game 
￼￼
I literally wanted to play this for a while even tho there's no servers its still good
Door closes or gate closes when I load in
Bro this game is so good. It had a lot of funny moments and scary stuff. I would recommend to friends.

best game ever just like the og starving apes but a lil bug 
the bug:
theres a glitch where when u getting chased my any monster,as soon as u turn a corner,the monster goes for the person infront of u like u disappeared and then he kills u because when he sees u he goes fast then slows down as ur running

reviews.review_title: Game is AMAZING im not even glazing ong
reviews.review_description: this game is a MUST try it is amazing and my favorite thing about it is the monsters are not to loud which make it even more scarier cause in any other game you would hear the music from the monster before you would see it which made it a little less scarier but in this game you dont hear it that much which makes it so MUCH more scarier. i love the movement but it is a little glitchy at times but its still amazing plus this game is not entirely done developing im pretty sure so thats the only bug and also i need the name for the cool music setting in the game i love the song but yeah this game is a 10/10 oh yeah i forgot to mention the graphics of this game is amazing also😄
Good game and all but you can’t really make it past the first level because you don’t have a flashlight. The keycard is in the vents but you can’t see anything in there.
I was playing and i couldn’t join and now I can’t join someone please help
I really like this game because the graphics are insane and a lot more I'm Also moderator in ape storage.
Everybody’s having a great time literally, this game is so good. I don’t even understand. Why are y’all giving bad reviews it’s literally good bro.
This game is super fun and one of my new favorite games. Usually when you first start the game its a little laggy but after that its ok.
